negativePrompt: text, logo, watermark, UI frame, blurry silhouette, cropped body, gore, real person likeness, copyrighted character
globalStyle: Create original high-quality 2D game art for a Korean web bullet-survivor game. The visual language is retro RTS-inspired sci-fi fantasy, readable at small sizes, polished, colorful, punchy, and game-ready. Use a three-quarter top-down/isometric angle unless the asset says otherwise. Do not copy any existing franchise design.
globalConstraints: Keep the subject centered, readable, and separated from the background. No labels, no captions, no signature, no real streamer face likeness.

assets.prompt: A heroic golden psionic blade infantry warrior, agile melee stance, glowing twin energy blades, ornate armor, compact silhouette for a player character sprite.
A powerful floating psionic energy titan, bright electric aura, broad shoulders, molten blue-white core, heavy damage-dealer presence.
A majestic alien aircraft carrier unit, gold and teal hull, small drone bays, elegant floating battleship silhouette, player character sprite.
A robed psionic storm caster, glowing hands, ornate hooded armor, calm mystic pose, electricity gathering around the figure.
A four-legged armored plasma walker, rounded alien chassis, glowing cannon, sturdy but cute readable player sprite.
A heavy scarab-launching siege crawler, gold plating, bulky mechanical body, glowing ammunition chamber, slow powerful unit feel.
A compact armored space rifle soldier, blue-gray power armor, oversized readable rifle, energetic stance, clean heroic player sprite.
A stealth sniper operative in sleek sci-fi armor, visor glow, long rifle, dark cloak accents, precise critical-hit character.
A sci-fi combat medic, white and coral armor, healing projector, soft green glow, friendly support character silhouette.

A fast hover bike scout vehicle, sharp nose, twin engines, mine-layer personality, dynamic angled pose.

A flying alien manta creature, purple membrane wings, curved tail, agile airborne silhouette, bright game-ready highlights.

A basic hostile alien walker for early waves, red-purple cracked carapace, four squat legs, glowing cyan bite plates, simple readable silhouette, less detailed than player characters, centered full body on pure #00ff00 chroma key background.

A fast hostile runner creature, lean raptor-like alien body, blade forelimbs, orange speed fins, forward-leaning sprint pose, small aggressive silhouette for quick enemy waves, centered full body on pure #00ff00 chroma key background.

Stage 4 hybrid laboratory stalker enemy, half biomechanical alien and half broken lab exosuit, cyan-purple energy seams, sharp surgical legs, elite mid-size threat silhouette, centered full body on pure #00ff00 chroma key background.

Stage 4 unstable lab drone enemy, floating cracked containment pod with small claw arms, leaking purple specimen fluid and cyan lights, fast fragile threat, centered full body on pure #00ff00 chroma key background.

Stage 4 chimera tank enemy, large fused alien beast in broken industrial armor, multiple shoulders, heavy lab restraint plates, magenta and cyan energy leaks, slow high-health silhouette, centered full body on pure #00ff00 chroma key background.
Stage 1 boss: large alien war beast, clear boss silhouette, glowing weak points, intimidating but colorful.
Stage 2 boss: giant biomechanical artillery monster, long body, cannons and organic armor, stronger and more complex than stage 1.
Stage 3 final boss: colossal cosmic hive tyrant, crown-like horns, multiple glowing cores, final encounter energy.

Stage 4 final boss for a Korean web bullet-survivor game, hybrid laboratory monstrosity, fused alien tyrant inside broken containment armor, asymmetrical white gunmetal plating, exposed purple bio-core, cyan reactor veins, restraint cables, final boss silhouette, three-quarter top-down/isometric, centered full body on pure #00ff00 chroma key background, no text, no logo.

Seamless tileable top-down battlefield ground texture for stage 1. Cracked sci-fi dirt, worn metal scraps embedded in the ground, sparse dry grass, faint blue mineral dust. Low visual noise so bullets and enemies remain readable. No horizon, no characters, no large central object, no text.

Seamless tileable top-down alien infestation ground texture for stage 2. Purple organic creep, wet sinew veins, dark rocky plates, faint green toxic glow in cracks. Readable and not too busy, with no horizon, no characters, no large central object, no text.

Seamless tileable top-down ancient alien temple ground texture for stage 3. Dark obsidian metal, gold worn inlays, violet-blue psionic cracks, angular ritual floor patterns. Readable and not too busy, no horizon, no characters, no large central object, no text.

Seamless tileable top-down hybrid laboratory floor texture for stage 4 final area. Cold gunmetal panels, broken containment grid lines, purple and cyan hybrid energy leaks, hints of bio-organic creep under transparent lab plating, warning stripes worn down, faint glass tube reflections. High-end final-stage mood but low visual noise for gameplay readability. No horizon, no characters, no large central object, no text.
